ab: namakuda kinaqadavan tucu a qadaw?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: cemdas anga a qadaw, maculju a ravac a qadaw.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: vucelelj a i casaw tucu?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: vucelelj aravac, kavau a pakaliyaw.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: maculj aravac a i casaw?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ini, venali anga, vucele a kirimu.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: namakuda kinakemudan nua kalevelevan?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: ini a vucelelj a ravac, ini a maculju a ravac, sarunguanguaq a ravac.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: namakuda, kalevlevan tucu a vengin?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: neka nu qerepus i kalevelevan, tjevutanga a vitjuqan.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: namakuda kelevelevan i casaw?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: tjaumeljai a qudjalj, cemdas anga a qadaw, minqut anga a quljivangeraw.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: namakuda a kalevelevan izua i tjanusun?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?

ab: mezangal aravac a vali imaza i tjanuamen.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: namakuda a i tjanumun a kalevelevan?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: bulai aravac, maqadaqadaw.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: uri vaik anga ken a sema gakku.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: vucelelj a kalevalevan, kavau a pakaliyaw.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: uri vaik anga ken a casaw.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: uri qemudjalj a paljeqaca nusauni, paqenetju anga kemacu tua kausua.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: uri qemudjalj?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: napageleng anga tasauni, nusauni tjara qemudjalj.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: qemudjaqudjalj anga?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: naqemudjalj tasauni, meljai anga tucu.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: qemudjaqudjalj anga?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: matu naqemudjalj anga, tjevetjeveng a kadjalanan.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: naqemudjalj? a ku tjevetjeveng a su kinacavacavan?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: qemudjaqudjalj anga a i casaw, ini kaken a nakemacu tua kausua.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: namakudanga sun?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: qacavali ravac a vali, vecengel a ku qulu ta ku kinivalian.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: namakuda anga sun?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: mezangal a qadaw, malingac aken ta ku kinipaqadavan.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
